---
title: ""
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="visual-detail">

  <a href="../3-visuals.html" class="back-link">← Back to Visuals</a>

  <h2 class="visual-title">Weather Station Coverage across Spain</h2>

  <div class="visual-detail-media">
    <img src="../images/visuals/plot1.jpg" alt="Weather stations Spain"/>
  </div>

  <div class="visual-meta">
    <p class="visual-desc">Choropleth map showing the distance from each Spanish municipality to the nearest AEMET weather station. Areas in deep blue are more than 15 km away from the closest station, revealing coverage gaps across the interior plateau and mountain ranges.</p>
    <table class="visual-info">
      <tr><td class="meta-label">Tools</td><td>Python · GeoPandas · Matplotlib</td></tr>
      <tr><td class="meta-label">Context</td><td>#30DayMapChallenge 2025 · Day: Points</td></tr>
      <tr><td class="meta-label">Data</td><td>AEMET OpenData · Administrative boundaries CNIG-IGN</td></tr>
    </table>
  </div>

</div>

<style>
.visual-detail {
  max-width: 900px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 1rem 1rem 3rem 1rem;
}
.back-link {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  color: #e8a020 !important;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}
.back-link:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}
.visual-title {
  font-size: 1.6rem;
  color: #e8a020 !important;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.visual-detail-media img,
.visual-detail-media video {
  width: 100%;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
  display: block;
}
.visual-meta {
  margin-top: 1.8rem;
}
.visual-desc {
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
  color: #333;
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  text-align: justify;
}
.visual-info {
  border: none;
  width: 100%;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}
.visual-info td {
  padding: 0.4rem 0.8rem 0.4rem 0;
  border: none;
  vertical-align: top;
}
.meta-label {
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #94805c;
  white-space: nowrap;
  width: 80px;
}
</style>
```
